title: GE Vernova 将收购 Robotech Automation 以扩大机器人集成
summary: Energy company GE Vernova is already working with systems integrator Robotech on supply chain projects. The post GE Vernova to acquire Robotech Automation to expand robotics integration appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：GE Vernova to acquire Robotech Automation to expand robotics integration）
